reviews.comment:
El la Estación de Servicio son atentos al atender, permiten el ingreso al baño,  que por la inmensa cantidad de gente que ingresa, sugiero, podrían higienizar más seguido, más en estos tiempos de cuidado y protocolos de higiene...

(Translated by Google)
The staff at the gas station are attentive and allow access to the restroom, which, given the large number of people using it, I suggest could be cleaned more frequently, especially in these times of hygiene protocols and safety measures.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5NHR1bWRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio con una atención que deja mucho que desear....el shoping con muy pocas ofertas para el turista.

(Translated by Google)
A gas station with service that leaves much to be desired...a shopping mall with very few offers for tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5Z0lqWTd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
recomendable para cargar combustible, nada mas. los sanitarios no muy limpios, tenés que andar corriendo al playero que está a mil atendiendo a uno y a otros, para que te de la llave.
Mientras que en otros lugares te dan gratis el agua del mate, acá es el lugar donde más caro me la cobraron

(Translated by Google)
Recommended for refueling, nothing more. The restrooms aren't very clean; you have to run to the attendant, who's constantly busy serving one customer after another, just to get the key.
While other places give you free water for mate, this is the place where they charged me the most for it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ejZEdzB3RRAB
